meaning: n.键盘,键盘乐器,练习用无音键盘
examples: Clavier: Produce the standard method of computer error.
The Well-Tempered Clavier (24), collection of preludes & fugues, Book II.
For example, "the Well-Tempered Clavier" composed by Bach represents the philosophical meaning.
Clavier points out that consolidation means layoffs, and layoffs mean talent that can be snapped up by start-ups.
"Figuring out an integration plan, who stays and who goes, what's important and what's redundant--it takes a long time, " says Clavier.
